candidate_problem_record.subject: 物理
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A $\pi$ meson with a momentum of $5 m_{\pi} c$ makes an elastic collision with a proton ($m_{p}=7 m_{\pi}$) which is initially at rest (Fig. 3.20). Find the momentum of the incident pion in the c.m. system.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。

extraction_notes: image entries are PIL object representations rather than concrete file paths or URLs
metadata.reasoning_chain: Solution: (c) The total energy in the c.m. frame is $$E^{\prime}=\sqrt{p_{\pi}^{\prime 2}+m_{\pi}^{2} c^{4}}+\sqrt{p_{p}^{\prime 2}+m_{p}^{2} c^{4}},$$ $$=\sqrt{p_{\pi}^{\prime 2}+m_{\pi}^{2} c^{4}}+\sqrt{p_{\pi}^{\prime 2}+49 m_{\pi}^{2} c^{4}},$$ since $|\mathbf{p}_{p}^{\prime}|=|\mathbf{p}_{\pi}^{\prime}|$ in the c.m. frame and $m_{p}=7 m_{\pi}$. From (b) we have $E^{\prime}=\sqrt{50+14 \sqrt{26}} m_{\pi} c^{2}$. Substituting this in the above and solving for $p_{\pi}^{\prime}$, we have $$p_{\pi}^{\prime}=\frac{35 m_{\pi} c}{\sqrt{50+14 \sqrt{26}}}=3.18 m_{\pi} c.$$

problem_main_record.reasoning_chain: Solution: (c) The total energy in the c.m. frame is $$E^{\prime}=\sqrt{p_{\pi}^{\prime 2}+m_{\pi}^{2} c^{4}}+\sqrt{p_{p}^{\prime 2}+m_{p}^{2} c^{4}},$$ $$=\sqrt{p_{\pi}^{\prime 2}+m_{\pi}^{2} c^{4}}+\sqrt{p_{\pi}^{\prime 2}+49 m_{\pi}^{2} c^{4}},$$ since $|\mathbf{p}_{p}^{\prime}|=|\mathbf{p}_{\pi}^{\prime}|$ in the c.m. frame and $m_{p}=7 m_{\pi}$. From (b) we have $E^{\prime}=\sqrt{50+14 \sqrt{26}} m_{\pi} c^{2}$. Substituting this in the above and solving for $p_{\pi}^{\prime}$, we have $$p_{\pi}^{\prime}=\frac{35 m_{\pi} c}{\sqrt{50+14 \sqrt{26}}}=3.18 m_{\pi} c.$$
